text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after Agnes Tachyon has a number of
victories under her belt...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer. You still have it on you, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You know, that thing we won by chance at the
shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Seeing as you haven't left the academy since
then, I'd imagine you're still carrying it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shopping district... won by chance... Hmmm,
could she be talking about the hot spring
vacation ticket we got from that raffle?
choice_data_list:
I still have this ticket if it's what you're asking
about...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, perfect. Then it's settled. We should head out
to our destination this instant.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean "huh?" Wouldn't it bother you
if you simply held it until it expired?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: What are you waiting for? Come on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she had complained about traveling
being nothing but a hassle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, I succumb to her pressure, and we end up
going on that hot spring vacation together.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Transferring between trains while carrying around
this heavy luggage was more bothersome than I
had thought...
choice_data_list: Well, this is what traveling is.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Is that so? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a long journey and multiple transfers, we
finally arrive at the hot spring inn.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Soaking in the hot spring...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Phew... They don't call them hot springs for no
reason.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How are you feeling? Were you able to
recuperate?
choice_data_list: I guess you could say so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After a long and arduous trip, soaking in a hot
spring is more comfortable than I imagined.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I see.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Could it be how the muscles relax due to the
warmth, or is it the healing effects of the
mineral-rich water? Or perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
No, never mind. In any case, you're enjoying the
benefits. That's what matters.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
After this, let's have dinner together. I already
arranged for the meal to be delivered to your
room.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: If you'll excuse me, I'll head out first.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, the food is already here! That big thing
there... is that a spiny lobster?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's said the ample amount of taurine found in
spiny lobster is beneficial in alleviating fatigue...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But taking into account the effort required to
peel the exoskeleton, it feels rather meaningless,
no?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, should we start? You peel the lobster for
me.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I ate myself into a coma. The spiny lobster was better than expected, though.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Well, what about you? You do look pretty
satisfied.
choice_data_list: I guess you could say so.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having a fancy meal like this, in a nice tranquil
place far removed from the worries of work.
Truthfully, it's very relaxing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, the tryptophan you ingested earlier is being
converted into serotonin, thus causing that
heightened feeling of happiness.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Or perhaps... hmm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to ask you something unusual, if that's
okay with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: With her, unusual questions are the norm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Why do you feel, as you say, "satisfied"?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You seem to be struggling for an answer. In that
case, why don't I take a guess as to why?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Today, we went through all the trouble of
packing our luggage and transferring between
trains, among other things to get here.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Fundamentally, troubles are nothing more than
troubles, but...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
During this special time frame—this
vacation—these troubles formed part of a greater
experience...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: And that is what, on the contrary, is serving to further this feeling of happiness. Sound correct?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe what I'm hearing. I sit there for a
moment, speechless.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, you should see the look on your face.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's true that, up until now, I never considered
such tedious frustrations could turn into valuable
experiences.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
But what I've learned in these past three years has
opened my eyes to an all-new hypothesis.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's a simple thing to categorize troubles as
troubles.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
It's easy to write them off as risks, discarding the
hidden possibilities they contain.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Which is why from here on, I shall make the effort
to discover those possibilities.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
This vacation was another experiment. And its
conclusion is here before our very eyes.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
In spite of all the troubles we went through, can
you say that you are enjoying yourself?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! That's my guinea pig!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend the rest of the day engaged in
conversation with Agnes Tachyon.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During this time together, I feel we have formed
an irreplaceable bond.
